commit.message:
LU-6142 header: Fix style issues for interval_tree.h

This patch fixes issues reported by checkpatch
for file lustre/include/interval_tree.h

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Change-Id: Id7791c96a541166d8c6ef46af50f9d1e5043c4f3
